creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
This was a problem on the 4.2-install ISO, which is superseeded by
4.3 and 4.4 now.
This was a problem with lsof 4.52, todays is 4.57.2.
It was only a warning in the package, not with the functionality.

Honestly & truthful answer:
"Woops sorry, it shouldn't have happened. If you want one without
the error, fetch the new one from
ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/4.2-RELEASE/packages/All/lsof-45.2.tgz"

This PR can be closed.

Edwin
